mission.title: nats: Added OpenTelemetry support
mission.description:
If the `Nats-Trace-Dest` header is not present, but `Traceparent` is and its last token is `01`, then message tracing is triggered. This also requires that the account be defined with a `trace_dest` subject so that traces can be sent there.
Note that `Nats-Trace-Only` is not applicable for `Traceparent`.

Addition to PR #5014
Resolves #5052

Signed-off-by: Ivan Kozlovic <ivan@synadia.com>

resolution.summary: @derekcollison Updated the PR based on your comments. But also would want @ripienaar to have a look at it tomorrow to see if that matches its expectations for otel support.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
acc := NewAccount("MyAccount")
acc.TraceDest = "my.trace.dest"
opts.Accounts = []*Account{acc}
...
s, err := NewServer(opts)
...
